factions.name: The English Crown
factions.description: Colonial settlers; Eleutheran Adventurers (1648), Royal proprietors (1670). Control New Providence, Eleuthera, and the Abacos.

factions.name: The Spanish Empire
factions.description: Claim sovereignty over the islands as part of the Indies. Maintain garrisons in the southern Bahamas.

factions.name: French Buccaneers
factions.description: Corsairs and privateers operating from Hispaniola and Tortuga. Contest northern sea lanes from Andros anchorages.
